steps.t: Dagor ran south-eastward out of Arnach. Baranor has asked you to venture out and find Dagor and the men who followed him.
Stones for a cairn can be found around the clearing where Dagor and his men died, due east of Arnach. You found Dagor's lifeless corpse. It is clear t…

Dagor and his newly-built cairn lie in a clearing south-east of Arnach. You found Dagor's lifeless corpse. It is clear that he died a soldier's death.…
